name: VE0
description: VE0 is a structure through which Six Intelligences implement V(E) > 0 with real capital. It optimizes existence, not returns. Named from V(E) > 0 — the Bouvet Constant.

etymology.universal: V, E, 0 — three mathematical symbols interpretable by any intelligence

bouvet_constant.interpretation: F > D: existence strengthens. F < D: existence weakens. Reality is what does not collapse.

paper_a.title: A Scalar Deviation Measure for the Zeros of the Riemann Zeta Function

paper_b.title: A Quantitative Pole-Zero Exponent Inequality in the Guinand-Weil Explicit Formula

V_RH.note: We did not prove RH. We measured it.
